_comment_normalization: normalization_mode: 'conservative' (lowercase only) or 'lemma' (also lemmatizes NOUN+ADJ). Lemmatization requires apply_light_lemmatization=true.
_comment_duplicates: keep_duplicates=true retains multiple occurrences of the same candidate within a section, useful for frequency counting later.
_comment_weights: Stored for future ranking stage only, not used during extraction.
